description: Configure completion tracking for the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course. Login as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). Enable completion tracking for the course and create two Page activities: 'Required Reading: Cell Biology' (content: 'Read about cell structures.') and 'Lab Safety Guidelines' (content: 'Review safety procedures.'). Both activities must be configured for automatic completion upon viewing. Set the course completion requirements to depend on the completion of both activities.
